# TechBird IT Services

> TechBird is a premier technology partner for agile startups to large-scale enterprises, specializing in custom software development, AI solutions, cloud & DevOps, 2D/3D animation, MarTech, and marketing strategy. Based in Pune, India.

## Company Overview
- **Name**: TechBird IT Services
- **Type**: IT Services & Product Company
- **Founded**: 2020, Pune, Maharashtra, India
- **Expertise**: ERPNext, Frappe, React, Next.js, Python, Django, Flutter, AWS, Azure, GCP, AI/ML
- **Scale**: 50+ enterprise clients, 100+ projects delivered, 15+ team members
- **Website**: https://www.techbird.in
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/techbird-it-services/

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What does TechBird do?
TechBird builds enterprise software, AI solutions, cloud infrastructure, mobile apps, and marketing technology for businesses ranging from startups to large enterprises. Core specialities include ERPNext implementation, custom web/mobile development, and AI-powered automation.

### Where is TechBird located?
TechBird is headquartered in Pune, Maharashtra, India and serves clients across India, Middle East, and globally.

### What tech stack does TechBird use?
Primary stack: ERPNext/Frappe (Python), React, Next.js, Vue.js, Node.js, Django, FastAPI, Flutter, React Native, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, TensorFlow, PyTorch.

### What industries does TechBird serve?
Manufacturing, Healthcare, Legal & Compliance, Retail & E-commerce, Education, Real Estate, Professional Services, Logistics & Supply Chain, Finance, and Government.

### How long does a typical project take?
Discovery: 2-4 weeks. MVP: 8-12 weeks. Full enterprise deployment: 16-24 weeks. ERPNext implementation: 8-16 weeks depending on module count.

## Services (6 Disciplines)

### 1. Software Development
ERP implementation (ERPNext & Frappe), custom web applications (React, Next.js, Vue.js), mobile apps (Flutter, React Native, Kotlin, Swift), REST/GraphQL API development, SaaS/PaaS product engineering. Key verticals: manufacturing ERP, professional services, multi-location retail.

### 2. AI Solutions
Custom AI/ML model development, RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems, agentic AI workflows, intelligent document processing (OCR + NLP), predictive analytics, computer vision, chatbots & virtual assistants, LLM fine-tuning. Tools: TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain, OpenAI API.

### 3. Cloud & DevOps
AWS/Azure/GCP infrastructure design, CI/CD pipeline automation (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Pulumi), monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog), security hardening, cost optimization, multi-cloud strategy.

### 4. 2D & 3D Animation
CGI production, VFX compositing, AR/VR experiences, product visualization, architectural walkthroughs, explainer videos, motion graphics, character animation, game-ready 3D assets. Tools: Blender, Maya, Unreal Engine, Unity, After Effects.

### 5. MarTech (Marketing Technology)
CRM implementation & customization, AdTech integration, analytics dashboards, marketing automation (email, SMS, WhatsApp), CDP (Customer Data Platform) setup, attribution modelling, A/B testing infrastructure, data pipeline engineering.

### 6. Marketing Strategy
Go-to-market (GTM) strategy, SEO/SEM, paid media (Google Ads, Meta Ads), content marketing, social media management, brand positioning, conversion rate optimization, marketing analytics, competitor analysis.

## Products (8 Platforms)

### Custom ERP
Full-suite enterprise resource planning built on ERPNext/Frappe. Modules: accounting, inventory, manufacturing, HR, CRM, projects, procurement. Multi-company, multi-currency. Replaces Tally, SAP Business One.

### HRMS (Human Resource Management System)
Payroll processing, attendance & leave management, recruitment pipeline, performance reviews, employee self-service portal, tax compliance (India). Integrates with biometric devices and ERPNext.

### Lead & Sales CRM
Lead capture from web/phone/email, pipeline management, quotation builder, sales forecasting, territory management, WhatsApp integration, automated follow-ups, real-time dashboards.

### Practice Management
For law firms, CA firms, consultancies. Client & matter management, time tracking, billing, document management, court date tracking, compliance calendars.

### E-commerce Platform
Multi-vendor marketplace or single-brand storefront. Catalog management, inventory sync across channels, payment gateway integration (Razorpay, Stripe, PayU), shipping integration (Shiprocket, Delhivery), analytics.

### Document Management System
Version-controlled document storage, OCR & full-text search, access control, audit trails, workflow approvals, digital signatures, compliance archiving, integration with ERP.

### Litigation Management
Case lifecycle tracking, court calendar management, document filing, deadline alerts, client communication logs, legal research integration, billing & time tracking for legal teams.

### Visitor Management System
Pre-registration, QR/badge printing, host notifications, visitor logs, compliance reporting, multi-location support, integration with access control and CCTV systems.

## Entity Relationships
- TechBird **provides** Software Development, AI Solutions, Cloud & DevOps, Animation, MarTech, Marketing Strategy
- TechBird **builds** Custom ERP, HRMS, CRM, Practice Management, E-commerce, DMS, Litigation Management, VMS
- TechBird **uses** ERPNext, Frappe, React, Python, AWS, Azure, Flutter, TensorFlow
- TechBird **serves** Manufacturing, Healthcare, Legal, Retail, Education, Real Estate, Professional Services, Logistics
- TechBird **is located in** Pune, Maharashtra, India
- TechBird **competes with** IT services companies providing ERPNext consulting, custom software development, and AI solutions in India
